ratings.note: First-time rating. LT bank facilities INR205.75cr (enhanced from INR45cr); LT/ST bank facilities INR11cr (enhanced from INR5cr, BBB+/Stable / A2); ST bank facilities INR83.25cr (A2). Unexecuted order book >INR850cr (excl. L1) as of 31 May 2025, ~4x FY25 revenue.

ratings.instrument: long-term bank facilities (revised to INR172.25cr from INR105.75cr)
ratings.note: Reaffirmed CARE BBB+/Stable. LT bank facilities INR172.25cr; LT/ST bank facilities INR11.50cr (enhanced from INR11cr); ST bank facilities INR116.25cr (enhanced from INR83.25cr). Unexecuted order book >INR1,500cr as of 31 Dec 2025. Rating tempered by moderate scale of operations, top-3-order concentration at 60% of order book, working-capital-intensive operations, and a TSHD fleet with average age over 50 years (maintenance/replacement capex risk).
